name: Windows Release Readiness Dry Run
description: Small report-only release/readiness lane for artifact metadata, service and driver status, and rollback/uninstall planning. Commands are non-destructive inspections and do not install, upgrade, rollback, uninstall, stop, or restart host components.

evidence_scope: binary path, version, signature, and hash metadata when installed artifacts are present
release manifest, SBOM, and compatibility matrix presence reported without reading private package contents
rollback and uninstall command surfaces recorded as planned/not executed
promotion_requires: generated SBOM attached to the release pack
successful install/update/rollback/uninstall execution on a clean Windows template
explicit separation from lab-only or unsigned builds

claim_boundary: Dry-run release/readiness contract only. Passing this profile proves that the validation runner can plan safe release evidence checks; it does not prove production signing, installer success, update success, rollback success, clean uninstall, endpoint detection coverage, P1/P2 roadmap coverage, or CALDERA parity.

tests.name: Agent Service Status Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$services = Get-Service -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'tamandua' -or $_.DisplayName -match 'tamandua' } | Select-Object Name,DisplayName,Status,StartType; if ($services) { $services | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } else { '{\"status\":\"not_found\",\"scope\":\"tamandua_service_report_only\"}' }"

tests.name: Driver Status Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$drivers = @(& sc.exe query type= driver state= all 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern 'tamandua|tamd' -CaseSensitive:$false | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }); if ($drivers.Count -gt 0) { [pscustomobject]@{ DriverLines=$drivers; Scope='driver_status_report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } else { '{\"status\":\"not_found\",\"scope\":\"driver_status_report_only\"}' }"

tests.name: Binary Hash Metadata Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$roots = @((Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'Tamandua'), (Join-Path ${env:ProgramFiles(x86)} 'Tamandua'), (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'Tamandua'), (Join-Path $env:WINDIR 'System32\drivers')) | Where-Object { $_ -and (Test-Path $_) }; $files = foreach ($root in $roots) { Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $root -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -File -Recurse -Include 'tamandua*.exe','tamandua*.dll','tamandua*.sys','tamd*.sys' | Select-Object -First 20 }; $files = @($files | Select-Object -Unique FullName); if ($files.Count -eq 0) { '{\"status\":\"not_found\",\"scope\":\"binary_hash_metadata_report_only\"}' } else { $files | ForEach-Object { $sig = Get-AuthenticodeSignature -FilePath $_.FullName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $hash = Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 -LiteralPath $_.FullName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [pscustomobject]@{ Path=$_.FullName; Length=$_.Length; Version=$_.VersionInfo.FileVersion; SignatureStatus=$sig.Status; Sha256=$hash.Hash } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }"

tests.name: Release Manifest SBOM Compatibility Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$manifest = $env:TAMANDUA_RELEASE_MANIFEST; $sbom = $env:TAMANDUA_RELEASE_SBOM; $compat = $env:TAMANDUA_RELEASE_COMPATIBILITY_MATRIX; [pscustomobject]@{ ManifestPath=$manifest; ManifestPresent=[bool]($manifest -and (Test-Path -LiteralPath $manifest)); SbomPath=$sbom; SbomPresent=[bool]($sbom -and (Test-Path -LiteralPath $sbom)); CompatibilityMatrixPath=$compat; CompatibilityMatrixPresent=[bool]($compat -and (Test-Path -LiteralPath $compat)); RequiredOs=@('Windows 10','Windows 11','Windows Server'); RuntimeEffect='none_report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"
